mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO
`core_chart_view_snapshot`
`core_chart_view`
(`id`, `title`, `scene_id`, `table_id`, `type`, `render`, `result_count`, `result_mode`, `x_axis`, `x_axis_ext`, `y_axis`, `y_axis_ext`, `ext_stack`, `ext_bubble`, `ext_label`, `ext_tooltip`, `custom_attr`, `custom_attr_mobile`, `custom_style`, `custom_style_mobile`, `custom_filter`, `drill_fields`, `senior`, `create_by`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `snapshot`, `style_priority`, `chart_type`, `is_plugin`, `data_from`, `view_fields`, `refresh_view_enable`, `refresh_unit`, `refresh_time`, `linkage_active`, `jump_active`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `flow_map_start_name`, `flow_map_end_name`, `ext_color`) SELECT ccv.`id` + #{copyId} as id, `title`, #{newDvId} as scene_id, `table_id`, `type`, `render`, `result_count`, `result_mode`, `x_axis`, `x_axis_ext`, `y_axis`, `y_axis_ext`, `ext_stack`, `ext_bubble`, `ext_label`, `ext_tooltip`, `custom_attr`, `custom_attr_mobile`, `custom_style`, `custom_style_mobile`, `custom_filter`, `drill_fields`, `senior`, `create_by`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `snapshot`, `style_priority`, `chart_type`, `is_plugin`, `data_from`, `view_fields`, `refresh_view_enable`, `refresh_unit`, `refresh_time`, `linkage_active`, `jump_active`, ccv.`id` as copy_from, #{copyId} as copy_id, `flow_map_start_name`, `flow_map_end_name`, `ext_color` FROM
core_chart_view_snapshot ccv
core_chart_view ccv
WHERE ccv.scene_id = #{sourceDvId}

INSERT INTO `core_visualization` (`id`, `name`, `pid`, `org_id`, `level`, `node_type`, `type`, `canvas_style_data`, `component_data`, `mobile_layout`, `status`, `self_watermark_status`, `sort`, `create_time`, `create_by`, `update_time`, `update_by`, `remark`, `source`, `delete_flag`, `delete_time`, `delete_by`) select #{newDvId}, `name`, `pid`, `org_id`, `level`, `node_type`, `type`, `canvas_style_data`, `component_data`, `mobile_layout`, `status`, `self_watermark_status`, `sort`, `create_time`, `create_by`, `update_time`, `update_by`, `remark`, `source`, `delete_flag`, `delete_time`, `delete_by` from core_visualization dvInfo where dvInfo.id = #{sourceDvId}

choose.when:
SELECT dvResource.id, dvResource.resource_id, dvResource.name, dvResource.ext_flag, dvResource.type, dvResource.creator, dvResource.last_editor, dvResource.last_edit_time, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM core_workspace_favorite_resource wfr WHERE wfr.resource_id = dvResource.resource_id AND wfr."UID" = #{uid} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorite FROM (SELECT CAST(core_dataset.id AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS id, CAST(core_dataset.id AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS resource_id, core_dataset.name AS name, CAST(0 AS NUMBER(10,0)) AS ext_flag, CAST('dataset' AS VARCHAR2(32)) AS type, CAST(TO_NUMBER(core_dataset.create_by) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS creator, CAST(TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(core_dataset.update_by, core_dataset.create_by)) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS last_editor, CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(core_dataset.last_update_time, 0), core_dataset.create_time) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS last_edit_time FROM core_dataset WHERE core_dataset.node_type = 'dataset' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(core_datasource.id AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS id, CAST(core_datasource.id AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS resource_id, core_datasource.name AS name, CAST(0 AS NUMBER(10,0)) AS ext_flag, CAST('datasource' AS VARCHAR2(32)) AS type, CAST(TO_NUMBER(core_datasource.create_by) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS creator, CAST(COALESCE(core_datasource.update_by, TO_NUMBER(core_datasource.create_by)) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS last_editor, CAST(COALESCE(core_datasource.update_time, core_datasource.create_time) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS last_edit_time FROM core_datasource WHERE core_datasource.type != 'folder' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(TO_NUMBER(core_visualization.id) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS id, CAST(TO_NUMBER(core_visualization.id) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS resource_id, core_visualization.name AS name, CAST(core_visualization.mobile_layout AS NUMBER(10,0)) AS ext_flag, CAST(CASE core_visualization.type WHEN 'dataV' THEN 'screen' ELSE 'panel' END AS VARCHAR2(32)) AS type, CAST(TO_NUMBER(core_visualization.create_by) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS creator, CAST(TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(core_visualization.update_by, core_visualization.create_by)) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS last_editor, CAST(COALESCE(core_visualization.update_time, core_visualization.create_time) AS NUMBER(19,0)) AS last_edit_time FROM core_visualization WHERE core_visualization.delete_flag = 0 AND core_visualization.node_type = 'leaf' AND core_visualization.status != 0) dvResource INNER JOIN core_workspace_recent_resource wrr ON dvResource.resource_id = wrr.resource_id AND wrr."UID" = #{uid} WHERE dvResource.name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(dvResource.name) IS NOT NULL
AND LOWER(dvResource.name) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND dvResource.type = #{ew.type}
order by wrr."TIME" asc
order by wrr."TIME" desc
choose.otherwise:
SELECT dvResource.id, dvResource.resource_id, dvResource.name, dvResource.ext_flag, dvResource.type, dvResource.creator, dvResource.last_editor, dvResource.last_edit_time, ( CASE
WHEN core_workspace_favorite_resource.resource_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS favorite FROM (SELECT core_dataset.id, core_dataset.id AS resource_id, core_dataset.NAME, 0 as ext_flag, 'dataset' AS type, core_dataset.create_by AS creator, COALESCE(core_dataset.update_by, core_dataset.create_by) AS last_editor, COALESCE(NULLIF(core_dataset.last_update_time, 0), core_dataset.create_time) AS last_edit_time FROM core_dataset WHERE core_dataset.node_type = 'dataset' UNION ALL SELECT core_datasource.id, core_datasource.id AS resource_id, core_datasource.NAME, 0 as ext_flag, 'datasource' AS type, core_datasource.create_by AS creator, COALESCE(core_datasource.update_by, core_datasource.create_by) AS last_editor, COALESCE(core_datasource.update_time, core_datasource.create_time) AS last_edit_time FROM core_datasource WHERE core_datasource.type != 'folder' UNION ALL SELECT core_visualization.id, core_visualization.id AS resource_id, core_visualization.NAME, core_visualization.`mobile_layout` as ext_flag, ( CASE core_visualization.type WHEN 'dataV' THEN 'screen' ELSE 'panel' END ) AS type, core_visualization.create_by AS creator, COALESCE(core_visualization.update_by, core_visualization.create_by) AS last_editor, COALESCE(core_visualization.update_time, core_visualization.create_time) AS last_edit_time FROM core_visualization WHERE core_visualization.delete_flag = 0 AND node_type = 'leaf' and core_visualization.status != 0 ) dvResource LEFT JOIN core_workspace_favorite_resource ON dvResource.id = core_workspace_favorite_resource.resource_id AND core_workspace_favorite_resource.uid = #{uid} INNER JOIN core_workspace_recent_resource ON dvResource.resource_id = core_workspace_recent_resource.resource_id AND core_workspace_recent_resource.uid = #{uid} AND dvResource.name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(dvResource.name) != ''
AND LOWER(dvResource.name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND dvResource.type = #{ew.type}
order by core_workspace_recent_resource.time asc
order by core_workspace_recent_resource.time desc

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO core_visualization_jump (`id`, `source_dv_id`, `source_view_id`, `link_jump_info`, `checked`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`) SELECT core_visualization_jump.`id` + #{copyId} as id, dv_view_copy.t_dv_id as source_dv_id, dv_view_copy.t_chart_view_id as source_view_id, core_visualization_jump.`link_jump_info`, core_visualization_jump.`checked`, core_visualization_jump.`id` as copy_from, #{copyId} as copy_id FROM core_visualization_jump INNER JOIN (SELECT pvs.scene_id AS s_dv_id, pvs.id AS s_chart_view_id, pvt.scene_id AS t_dv_id, pvt.id AS t_chart_view_id FROM core_chart_view pvt INNER JOIN core_chart_view pvs ON pvt.copy_from = pvs.id WHERE pvt.copy_id = #{copyId}) dv_view_copy ON core_visualization_jump.source_dv_id = dv_view_copy.s_dv_id AND core_visualization_jump.source_view_id = dv_view_copy.s_chart_view_id

INSERT INTO core_visualization_jump_action (id, link_jump_id, link_type, jump_type, target_dv_id, source_field_id, content, `checked`, `attach_params`, copy_from, copy_id) SELECT core_visualization_jump_action.`id` + #{copyId} as id, plj_copy.t_id as link_jump_id, core_visualization_jump_action.`link_type`, core_visualization_jump_action.`jump_type`, core_visualization_jump_action.`target_dv_id`, core_visualization_jump_action.`source_field_id`, core_visualization_jump_action.`content`, core_visualization_jump_action.`checked`, core_visualization_jump_action.`attach_params`, core_visualization_jump_action.`id` AS copy_from, #{copyId} AS copy_id FROM core_visualization_jump_action INNER JOIN (SELECT id AS t_id, copy_from AS s_id FROM core_visualization_jump WHERE copy_id = #{copyId}) plj_copy ON core_visualization_jump_action.link_jump_id = plj_copy.s_id

INSERT INTO core_visualization_jump_target (`target_id`, `link_jump_info_id`, `source_field_active_id`, `target_view_id`, `target_field_id`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`) SELECT vljtvi.`target_id` + #{copyId} as target_id, plji_copy.t_id as link_jump_info_id, vljtvi.`source_field_active_id`, vljtvi.`target_view_id`, vljtvi.`target_field_id`, vljtvi.`target_id` AS copy_from, #{copyId} AS copy_id FROM core_visualization_jump_target vljtvi INNER JOIN (SELECT id AS t_id, copy_from AS s_id FROM core_visualization_jump_action WHERE copy_id = #{copyId}) plji_copy ON vljtvi.link_jump_info_id = plji_copy.s_id

INSERT INTO core_visualization_linkage (`id`, dv_id, source_view_id, target_view_id, `update_time`, `update_people`, `linkage_active`, `ext1`, `ext2`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`) SELECT core_visualization_linkage.`id` + #{copyId} as `id`, pv_source_copy.t_dv_id AS dv_id, pv_source_copy.t_chart_view_id AS source_view_id, pv_target_copy.t_chart_view_id AS target_view_id, `update_time`, `update_people`, `linkage_active`, `ext1`, `ext2`, core_visualization_linkage.`id` as copy_from, #{copyId} as copy_id FROM core_visualization_linkage INNER JOIN (SELECT pvs.scene_id AS s_dv_id, pvs.id AS s_chart_view_id, pvt.scene_id AS t_dv_id, pvt.id AS t_chart_view_id FROM core_chart_view pvt INNER JOIN core_chart_view pvs ON pvt.copy_from = pvs.id WHERE pvt.copy_id = #{copyId}) pv_source_copy ON core_visualization_linkage.dv_id = pv_source_copy.s_dv_id AND core_visualization_linkage.source_view_id = pv_source_copy.s_chart_view_id INNER JOIN (SELECT pvs.scene_id AS s_dv_id, pvs.id AS s_chart_view_id, pvt.scene_id AS t_dv_id, pvt.id AS t_chart_view_id FROM core_chart_view pvt INNER JOIN core_chart_view pvs ON pvt.copy_from = pvs.id WHERE pvt.copy_id = #{copyId}) pv_target_copy ON core_visualization_linkage.dv_id = pv_target_copy.s_dv_id AND core_visualization_linkage.target_view_id = pv_target_copy.s_chart_view_id

INSERT INTO core_visualization_linkage_field (id, `linkage_id`, `source_field`, `target_field`, `update_time`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`) SELECT core_visualization_linkage_field.`id` + #{copyId} as `id`, pvlf_copy.t_id as `linkage_id`, `source_field`, `target_field`, `update_time`, id AS copy_from, #{copyId} as copy_id FROM core_visualization_linkage_field INNER JOIN (SELECT id AS t_id, copy_from AS s_id FROM core_visualization_linkage WHERE copy_id = #{copyId}) pvlf_copy ON core_visualization_linkage_field.linkage_id = pvlf_copy.s_id
mapper.select: SELECT ccv.id, ccv.title, ccv.scene_id, ccv.table_id, ccv.`type`, ccv.render, ccv.scene_id as `visualization_id`, core_dataset_field.id AS `field_id`, core_dataset_field.origin_name, core_dataset_field.`name` AS `field_name`, core_dataset_field.type AS `raw_field_type`, core_dataset_field.field_type AS `field_type` FROM core_chart_view_snapshot ccv LEFT JOIN core_dataset_field ON ccv.table_id = core_dataset_field.dataset_group_id WHERE ccv.scene_id = #{dvId} AND ccv.id IS NOT NULL and ccv.`type` != 'VQuery'

SELECT `id`, `report_id`, `resource_id`, `dv_type`, `component_id`, `filter_id`, `filter_info`, `filter_version`, `create_time`, `create_user` FROM core_visualization_report_filter where core_visualization_report_filter.resource_id = #{dvId} and core_visualization_report_filter.task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM
core_visualization_snapshot dvi
core_visualization dvi
WHERE dvi.id IN
#{id}

DELETE FROM
core_chart_view_snapshot ccv
core_chart_view ccv
WHERE ccv.scene_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: select id,account,name from core_iam_user where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT into core_visualization_snapshot ( `id`, `name`, `pid`, `org_id`, `level`, `node_type`, `type`, `canvas_style_data`, `component_data`, `mobile_layout`, `status`, `self_watermark_status`, `sort`, `create_time`, `create_by`, `update_time`, `update_by`, `remark`, `source`, `delete_flag`, `delete_time`, `delete_by`, `version`, `content_id`, `check_version` ) SELECT `id`, `name`, `pid`, `org_id`, `level`, `node_type`, `type`, `canvas_style_data`, `component_data`, `mobile_layout`, `status`, `self_watermark_status`, `sort`, `create_time`, `create_by`, `update_time`, `update_by`, `remark`, `source`, `delete_flag`, `delete_time`, `delete_by`, `version`, `content_id`, `check_version` FROM core_visualization WHERE id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_chart_view_snapshot ( `id`, `title`, `scene_id`, `table_id`, `type`, `render`, `result_count`, `result_mode`, `x_axis`, `x_axis_ext`, `y_axis`, `y_axis_ext`, `ext_stack`, `ext_bubble`, `ext_label`, `ext_tooltip`, `custom_attr`, `custom_attr_mobile`, `custom_style`, `custom_style_mobile`, `custom_filter`, `drill_fields`, `senior`, `create_by`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `snapshot`, `style_priority`, `chart_type`, `is_plugin`, `data_from`, `view_fields`, `refresh_view_enable`, `refresh_unit`, `refresh_time`, `linkage_active`, `jump_active`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `aggregate`, `flow_map_start_name`, `flow_map_end_name`, `ext_color`, `sort_priority` ) SELECT `id`, `title`, `scene_id`, `table_id`, `type`, `render`, `result_count`, `result_mode`, `x_axis`, `x_axis_ext`, `y_axis`, `y_axis_ext`, `ext_stack`, `ext_bubble`, `ext_label`, `ext_tooltip`, `custom_attr`, `custom_attr_mobile`, `custom_style`, `custom_style_mobile`, `custom_filter`, `drill_fields`, `senior`, `create_by`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `snapshot`, `style_priority`, `chart_type`, `is_plugin`, `data_from`, `view_fields`, `refresh_view_enable`, `refresh_unit`, `refresh_time`, `linkage_active`, `jump_active`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `aggregate`, `flow_map_start_name`, `flow_map_end_name`, `ext_color`, `sort_priority` FROM core_chart_view WHERE scene_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_jump_target_snapshot ( `target_id`, `link_jump_info_id`, `source_field_active_id`, `target_view_id`, `target_field_id`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `target_type` ) SELECT vljtvi.`target_id`, vljtvi.`link_jump_info_id`, vljtvi.`source_field_active_id`, vljtvi.`target_view_id`, vljtvi.`target_field_id`, vljtvi.`copy_from`, vljtvi.`copy_id`, vljtvi.`target_type` FROM core_visualization_jump_target vljtvi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_action vlji ON vljtvi.link_jump_info_id = vlji.id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump vlj ON vlji.link_jump_id = vlj.id WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot ( `id`, `link_jump_id`, `link_type`, `jump_type`, `target_dv_id`, `source_field_id`, `content`, `checked`, `attach_params`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `window_size` ) SELECT vlji.`id`, vlji.`link_jump_id`, vlji.`link_type`, vlji.`jump_type`, vlji.`target_dv_id`, vlji.`source_field_id`, vlji.`content`, vlji.`checked`, vlji.`attach_params`, vlji.`copy_from`, vlji.`copy_id`, vlji.`window_size` FROM core_visualization_jump_action vlji LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump vlj ON vlji.link_jump_id = vlj.id WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_jump_snapshot ( `id`, `source_dv_id`, `source_view_id`, `link_jump_info`, `checked`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vlj.`id`, vlj.`source_dv_id`, vlj.`source_view_id`, vlj.`link_jump_info`, vlj.`checked`, vlj.`copy_from`, vlj.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_jump vlj WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_linkage_field_snapshot ( `id`, `linkage_id`, `source_field`, `target_field`, `update_time`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vlf.`id`, vlf.`linkage_id`, vlf.`source_field`, vlf.`target_field`, vlf.`update_time`, vlf.`copy_from`, vlf.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_linkage_field vlf LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage vl ON vlf.linkage_id = vl.id WHERE vl.dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_linkage_snapshot ( `id`, `dv_id`, `source_view_id`, `target_view_id`, `update_time`, `update_people`, `linkage_active`, `ext1`, `ext2`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vl.`id`, vl.`dv_id`, vl.`source_view_id`, vl.`target_view_id`, vl.`update_time`, vl.`update_people`, vl.`linkage_active`, vl.`ext1`, vl.`ext2`, vl.`copy_from`, vl.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_linkage vl WHERE vl.dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_parameter_target_snapshot ( `target_id`, `params_info_id`, `target_view_id`, `target_field_id`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `target_ds_id`, `match_mode` ) SELECT voptvi.`target_id`, voptvi.`params_info_id`, voptvi.`target_view_id`, voptvi.`target_field_id`, voptvi.`copy_from`, voptvi.`copy_id`, voptvi.`target_ds_id`, voptvi.`match_mode` FROM core_visualization_parameter_target voptvi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_item vopi ON vopi.params_info_id = voptvi.params_info_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter vop ON vop.params_id = vopi.params_id WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}

INSERT INTO core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot ( `params_info_id`, `params_id`, `param_name`, `checked`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `required`, `default_value`, `enabled_default` ) SELECT vopi.`params_info_id`, vopi.`params_id`, vopi.`param_name`, vopi.`checked`, vopi.`copy_from`, vopi.`copy_id`, vopi.`required`, vopi.`default_value`, vopi.`enabled_default` FROM core_visualization_parameter_item vopi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter vop ON vop.params_id = vopi.params_id WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_parameter_snapshot ( `params_id`, `visualization_id`, `checked`, `remark`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vop.`params_id`, vop.`visualization_id`, vop.`checked`, vop.`remark`, vop.`copy_from`, vop.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_parameter vop WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}

INSERT INTO core_visualization ( `id`, `name`, `pid`, `org_id`, `level`, `node_type`, `type`, `canvas_style_data`, `component_data`, `mobile_layout`, `status`, `self_watermark_status`, `sort`, `create_time`, `create_by`, `update_time`, `update_by`, `remark`, `source`, `delete_flag`, `delete_time`, `delete_by`, `version`, `content_id`, `check_version` ) SELECT `id`, `name`, `pid`, `org_id`, `level`, `node_type`, `type`, `canvas_style_data`, `component_data`, `mobile_layout`, `status`, `self_watermark_status`, `sort`, `create_time`, `create_by`, `update_time`, `update_by`, `remark`, `source`, `delete_flag`, `delete_time`, `delete_by`, `version`, `content_id`, `check_version` FROM core_visualization_snapshot WHERE id = #{dvId}

INSERT INTO core_chart_view ( `id`, `title`, `scene_id`, `table_id`, `type`, `render`, `result_count`, `result_mode`, `x_axis`, `x_axis_ext`, `y_axis`, `y_axis_ext`, `ext_stack`, `ext_bubble`, `ext_label`, `ext_tooltip`, `custom_attr`, `custom_attr_mobile`, `custom_style`, `custom_style_mobile`, `custom_filter`, `drill_fields`, `senior`, `create_by`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `snapshot`, `style_priority`, `chart_type`, `is_plugin`, `data_from`, `view_fields`, `refresh_view_enable`, `refresh_unit`, `refresh_time`, `linkage_active`, `jump_active`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `aggregate`, `flow_map_start_name`, `flow_map_end_name`, `ext_color`, `sort_priority` ) SELECT `id`, `title`, `scene_id`, `table_id`, `type`, `render`, `result_count`, `result_mode`, `x_axis`, `x_axis_ext`, `y_axis`, `y_axis_ext`, `ext_stack`, `ext_bubble`, `ext_label`, `ext_tooltip`, `custom_attr`, `custom_attr_mobile`, `custom_style`, `custom_style_mobile`, `custom_filter`, `drill_fields`, `senior`, `create_by`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `snapshot`, `style_priority`, `chart_type`, `is_plugin`, `data_from`, `view_fields`, `refresh_view_enable`, `refresh_unit`, `refresh_time`, `linkage_active`, `jump_active`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `aggregate`, `flow_map_start_name`, `flow_map_end_name`, `ext_color`, `sort_priority` FROM core_chart_view_snapshot WHERE scene_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_jump_target ( `target_id`, `link_jump_info_id`, `source_field_active_id`, `target_view_id`, `target_field_id`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `target_type` ) SELECT vljtvi.`target_id`, vljtvi.`link_jump_info_id`, vljtvi.`source_field_active_id`, vljtvi.`target_view_id`, vljtvi.`target_field_id`, vljtvi.`copy_from`, vljtvi.`copy_id`, vljtvi.`target_type` FROM core_visualization_jump_target_snapshot vljtvi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot vlji ON vljtvi.link_jump_info_id = vlji.id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot vlj ON vlji.link_jump_id = vlj.id WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT INTO core_visualization_jump_action ( `id`, `link_jump_id`, `link_type`, `jump_type`, `target_dv_id`, `source_field_id`, `content`, `checked`, `attach_params`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `window_size` ) SELECT vlji.`id`, vlji.`link_jump_id`, vlji.`link_type`, vlji.`jump_type`, vlji.`target_dv_id`, vlji.`source_field_id`, vlji.`content`, vlji.`checked`, vlji.`attach_params`, vlji.`copy_from`, vlji.`copy_id`, vlji.`window_size` FROM core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot vlji LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot vlj ON vlji.link_jump_id = vlj.id WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT INTO core_visualization_jump ( `id`, `source_dv_id`, `source_view_id`, `link_jump_info`, `checked`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vlj.`id`, vlj.`source_dv_id`, vlj.`source_view_id`, vlj.`link_jump_info`, vlj.`checked`, vlj.`copy_from`, vlj.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_jump_snapshot vlj WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT INTO core_visualization_linkage_field ( `id`, `linkage_id`, `source_field`, `target_field`, `update_time`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vlf.`id`, vlf.`linkage_id`, vlf.`source_field`, vlf.`target_field`, vlf.`update_time`, vlf.`copy_from`, vlf.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_linkage_field_snapshot vlf LEFT JOIN core_visualization_linkage_snapshot vl ON vlf.linkage_id = vl.id WHERE vl.dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT INTO core_visualization_linkage ( `id`, `dv_id`, `source_view_id`, `target_view_id`, `update_time`, `update_people`, `linkage_active`, `ext1`, `ext2`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vl.`id`, vl.`dv_id`, vl.`source_view_id`, vl.`target_view_id`, vl.`update_time`, vl.`update_people`, vl.`linkage_active`, vl.`ext1`, vl.`ext2`, vl.`copy_from`, vl.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_linkage_snapshot vl WHERE vl.dv_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_parameter_target ( `target_id`, `params_info_id`, `target_view_id`, `target_field_id`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `target_ds_id`, `match_mode` ) SELECT voptvi.`target_id`, voptvi.`params_info_id`, voptvi.`target_view_id`, voptvi.`target_field_id`, voptvi.`copy_from`, voptvi.`copy_id`, voptvi.`target_ds_id`, voptvi.`match_mode` FROM core_visualization_parameter_target_snapshot voptvi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot vopi ON vopi.params_info_id = voptvi.params_info_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_snapshot vop ON vop.params_id = vopi.params_id WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_parameter_item ( `params_info_id`, `params_id`, `param_name`, `checked`, `copy_from`, `copy_id`, `required`, `default_value`, `enabled_default` ) SELECT vopi.`params_info_id`, vopi.`params_id`, vopi.`param_name`, vopi.`checked`, vopi.`copy_from`, vopi.`copy_id`, vopi.`required`, vopi.`default_value`, vopi.`enabled_default` FROM core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot vopi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_snapshot vop ON vop.params_id = vopi.params_id WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}

INSERT into core_visualization_parameter ( `params_id`, `visualization_id`, `checked`, `remark`, `copy_from`, `copy_id` ) SELECT vop.`params_id`, vop.`visualization_id`, vop.`checked`, vop.`remark`, vop.`copy_from`, vop.`copy_id` FROM core_visualization_parameter_snapshot vop WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}
